name: Solteq Oyj
summary: Solteq Oyj, an IT service and software company, provides digital business solutions and industry-specific software in Finland, Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Poland, and the United Kingdom. The company offers Solteq Cloud POS, a point-of sale (POS) solution for cafeteria, lunch restaurants, events, and self-service needs; Solteq Tekso, a cash register system for fashion and hardware shops, other specialty shops, and grocery retail; and Solteq Order Engine that is tailored to individual customer needs. It also provides Solteq Robotics for customized packages and continuous service; and Solteq Retail Robot, which moves inside a store to recognize products, empty or hole shelves, and incorrect price tags, as well as builds 3D maps of stores with product locations and integrates to the POS, PIM, planogram, and ERP systems. In addition, the company offers inPulse4Utilities that provides tools for digital customer engagement for district heating, water supply, and energy companies; inWorks, which offers browser-based customer data management and invoicing systems; and Solteq Smart Dealer, which offers automotive and aftermarket products. Further, it provides Solteq WebService, a cloud-based ERP system for vehicle maintenance and after-sales services; Trafi √Ç¬ñquery, a search portal for accessing up-to-date vehicle and customer information from the Trafi ATJ database; Customer Data Refreshment, which offers up to date customer data; Solteq Care, an electronic journal system, for municipality health care; and Solteq Tooth, a dental system for handling records and patient-oriented administrative tasks. The company was formerly known as Tampereen Tiedonhallinta. Solteq Oyj was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.
